# Library — Table of Contents

> The single referential index of all durable knowledge. **Load this once**, then
> read only the specific entries whose **description** matches your task. Do not
> re-read it if it is already in your context.
>
> This file is generated by the `librarian-archivist` from each entry's
> frontmatter. Do not hand-edit rows; edit the entry and let the archivist
> regenerate. Last regenerated: <YYYY-MM-DD>.

## How to use
1. Scan the **Description** column for entries whose trigger words match what you
   are about to do.
2. Open only those entries (the **Path** column).
3. If nothing matches but you *expected* it to, note it — that is a description
   miss the `/librarian audit` should fix.

---

## <Domain>

### <Subdomain>
| Topic | Description (when to load) | Path | Updated |
|-------|----------------------------|------|---------|
| <title> | <retrieval description> | `knowledge/<domain>/<subdomain>/<topic>.md` | <YYYY-MM-DD> |
